author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Fused single-pass sigmoid/tanh kernels eliminate 2 intermediate buffer allocations per call. sigmoid: 3154→1413us (2.2x faster). tanh: 1784→1500us (1.2x). Also added fast_sin/fast_cos with pool allocator + rayon parallelism (no speedup vs scalar — needs SLEEF polynomials for vectorization). 587 tests pass.
